channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 97922edc-56af-49a9-8996-4679a6e10e68
Display name: Provisioned Machine Admin
Description: Grants full access to Azure Stack HCI Provisioned Machine resources, including disk management, device reset, deletion, and the ability to assign others as Provisioned Machine Reader and/or Contributor
Link: https://management.azure.com/97922edc-56af-49a9-8996-4679a6e10e68?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: dab09fbf-28d0-4b30-b97e-d2a0f680847a
Display name: Provisioned Machine Contributor
Description: Grants permissions to manage Azure Stack HCI Provisioned Machine resources, excluding disk management, device reset, and resource deletion
Link: https://management.azure.com/dab09fbf-28d0-4b30-b97e-d2a0f680847a?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: 58f930cc-fcf4-4152-852c-1d7dbf502139
Display name: Entra SOC Identity Responder
Description: Perform identity containment actions for SOC incident response, including disabling users, revoking sessions, and resetting passwords.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/58f930cc-fcf4-4152-852c-1d7dbf502139
